case_title: BUENAVENTURA TRAVEL et al VS BROC, JASON et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO NOV-14-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-24-2001 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUENAVENTURA TRAVEL ORTIZ, ANNE NANCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROC, JASON CONNER, JASON $720.60 PRINCIPAL, $58.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $778.60, JASON BROC IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
